name: adr-readme-index-regen
description: ADR README index regeneration: extract H1 verbatim (strip 'ADR-NNNN[a]: ' prefix), pull status+date from YAML frontmatter, capitalize status, and encode amendment cross-refs in the Status column ('Accepted (amended by [NNNNa](...))' / 'Superseded in part by [NNNN](...)'). Preserve non-table sections untouched. Use awk to walk frontmatter (counting --- delimiters) and grep -m1 '^# ADR-' for the H1. Numerical sort with 31a inserted between 31 and 32.

name: adr-promotion-audit-rule
description: ADR promotion audit rule: promote 'proposed' to 'accepted' only when every numbered verification gate the ADR itself declared is either (a) ratified by an accepted amendment ADR that does NOT override the foundational direction, or (b) closed inline with evidence. Open gates that an amendment explicitly defers to a later phase (e.g. ADR-0048 deferring ADR-0043 Phase 3) keep the parent proposed — amendments closing some gates is necessary but not sufficient. Always check amended_by frontmatter is complete (multiple synthesis ADRs may amend a single foundational one) before auditing.
